Name: MongoDB - Create Database if not exists
Description: Creates a new database on a MongoDB server with an initial collection.
Author: twerthi

Parameters.Name: MongoDBServerName
Parameters.Label: Server Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name or IP address of the MongoDB server instance.

Parameters.Name: MongoDBPort
Parameters.Label: Port
Parameters.HelpText: Port number the MongoDB instance is listening on.

Parameters.Name: MongoDBDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database to create.

Parameters.Name: MongoDBInitialCollection
Parameters.Label: Initial Collection
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Initial Collection in the database.

Parameters.Name: MogoDBUserpassword
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password for the user to connect with.
